headline: Citi Cuts SHW Target to $385, Flags Oil-Driven Raw Material Pressure
summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) is included among the 15 Best Consistent Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 1, Citi lowered its price recommendation on The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) to $385 from $410. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The firm said a spike in oil prices, along with supply disruptions, has […]
